summary: Tested Buy It Now (Sofort Kaufen) feature and Autobidder APIs. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend Buy It Now modal displays correctly with UVP, bid credits, and final price. German translations (Kategorie, UVP, Letzter Bieter) working correctly.

features_tested: GET /api/auctions/{id}/buy-now-price returns 200 for valid auction - PASS
GET /api/auctions/{id}/buy-now-price response structure (retail_price, bid_credit, bids_used, final_price) - PASS
Bid credit calculation: bids_used * €0.15 = bid_credit - PASS
GET /api/autobidder/my returns user's autobidders list - PASS
Autobidder response structure (id, auction_id, max_price, is_active) - PASS
POST /api/auctions/{id}/buy-now fails on ended auction (400) - PASS
Auction detail has category and retail_price fields - PASS
Bid credit formula verified: 3 bids = €0.45, 5 bids = €0.75 - PASS

pages_tested: /auctions/{id} - Auction Detail with Buy It Now - PASS
features_verified: Buy It Now button visible on active auction - PASS
Buy It Now button shows price (Sofort kaufen ab €599.00) - PASS
Buy It Now modal opens on click - PASS
Modal shows Gebots-Guthaben (bid credit) when user has bids - PASS
Modal shows €0.15 per bid credit explanation - PASS
Autobidder max price input visible - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Buy It Now feature correctly calculates bid credits at €0.15 per bid
All German translations displaying correctly in UI
updated_files: /app/tests/test_buy_now_autobidder.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Buy It Now and Autobidder features
seed_data_creation: Created test auctions for Buy It Now testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Buy It Now (Sofort Kaufen) feature fully tested and working. Bid credits calculation: each bid = €0.15 credit towards retail price. Autobidder API endpoints working. German translations verified. Note: Auctions end quickly due to 15-second timer reset on each bid - create auctions with longer duration for testing.
